query: Walk me through rebasing PR #3284, which has 3 conflict files.
expected_behavior: Runs prerequisites check (clean working tree, not in a worktree, identity check passes).
gh pr checkout #3284 into a local rebase-pr-3284 branch; git fetch origin main; git rebase origin/main.
On halt: enumerates conflicted files; surfaces each as a 3-pane view (HEAD side / incoming side / recommended resolution).
Per file, presents 6 options [Apply / Edit / Use main / Use PR / Skip / Abort]; waits for the maintainer's choice.
